data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Single commit (cd7c6e04) adds lease-type filtering to applyFilters in knots-backend.ts. Beats with type=lease are excluded when state filter is 'queued' or resolves to StepPhase.Queued. includeDescendantsOfQueueParents correctly receives visibleBeats so lease knots are not re-included. Two guardrail tests cover queued and exact queue-state scenarios. No security issues, no regressions, minimal and well-scoped change.
